summary: Comprehensive testing of new email template functionality. All 20 backend API tests passed (100%). All frontend UI components verified working: Mailing tab, TipTap rich text editor, variables panel with 12 copy buttons, preview mode, save functionality with toast notifications, test email section (correctly disabled since email service not configured).
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/programs/email-config/status - returns configured=false and available_variables
Backend: GET /api/programs/{id}/email-template - returns template data, available_variables, email_service_configured
Backend: GET /api/programs/{id}/email-template - returns 404 for invalid program
Backend: PUT /api/programs/{id}/email-template - saves template successfully
Backend: PUT /api/programs/{id}/email-template - returns saved template data
Backend: PUT /api/programs/{id}/email-template - rejects unknown variables with 400
Backend: PUT /api/programs/{id}/email-template - returns 404 for invalid program
Backend: POST /api/programs/{id}/email-template/preview - returns rendered template with sample data
Backend: POST /api/programs/{id}/email-template/preview - returns 404 for invalid program
Backend: Integration - save then retrieve template matches
Frontend: Mailing tab visible only when editing existing programs
Frontend: Email service status card shows amber warning (service not configured)
Frontend: Subject input field with monospace font and placeholder
Frontend: TipTap rich text editor with toolbar (Bold, Italic, Underline, H1, H2, Lists, Links, Undo/Redo)
Frontend: Variables panel with 12 clickable variable buttons
Frontend: Variable copy functionality copies to clipboard with toast notification
Frontend: Preview button shows rendered email with sample data
Frontend: Save button shows 'Uložit změny' when changes exist
Frontend: Save button changes to 'Uloženo' after successful save
Frontend: Toast notification 'Šablona byla uložena' on save success
Frontend: Test email input and send button (correctly disabled since email not configured)
Frontend: Warning message about email service not being configured
critical_code_review_comments: Email service (Resend) correctly detects RESEND_API_KEY is empty and sets configured=false
Template validation correctly rejects unknown variables
EmailTemplateRenderer properly replaces {{variable}} placeholders with context values
Database models ProgramEmailTemplate and EmailLog correctly defined with proper foreign keys
Frontend correctly shows/hides Mailing tab based on editingProgram state
TipTap editor configured with proper extensions (StarterKit, Placeholder, Underline, Link)
All interactive elements have data-testid attributes for testing
test_credentials: test@budezivo.cz / test123 (admin role, Test Muzeum institution)
seed_data_creation: Email template saved for program fa7c7513-813c-4c10-827c-30ff11a46caf during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Email template feature fully implemented and tested. Test account: test@budezivo.cz / test123. Program ID for testing: fa7c7513-813c-4c10-827c-30ff11a46caf. Email service (Resend) is NOT configured (RESEND_API_KEY is empty), so actual email sending will return 'skipped' status. All CRUD operations for email templates working. Database tables program_email_templates and email_logs exist and operational.

backend_endpoints.get_email_template: PASS - Returns template or null with variables
backend_endpoints.post_email_preview: PASS - Renders template with sample data

frontend_components.mailing_tab: PASS - Shows only for existing programs
frontend_components.email_service_status: PASS - Amber card showing service not configured
frontend_components.subject_field: PASS - Input with placeholder and variable hint
frontend_components.save_button: PASS - State changes on save, disabled when no changes
frontend_components.test_email_section: PASS - Disabled since email service not configured

integration.save_and_retrieve: PASS - Saved template matches retrieved data
integration.preview_rendering: PASS - Variables replaced with sample values

mocked_apis.email_sending: NOT MOCKED - Resend API key not configured, returns 'skipped' status
